title: Capture runtime telemetry policy
summary: Publish the telemetry storage, ownership, enablement, and documentation rules before runtime instrumentation lands.
scope_items: Add a reusable-core runtime telemetry standard.
Update foundation and pack-authoring guidance for runtime telemetry.
Add ignore rules and pack-local runtime path guidance.
done_when_items: The runtime telemetry policy is captured in standards and companion docs.
The repo ignores pack-local runtime telemetry outputs.
